steps.title: Identify the structural progression
steps.content: The text moves from a broad statement about high-speed rail expanding globally (“high-speed rail systems are expanding in many countries...”) to a specific instance (“In Morocco, for instance...”) with concrete numbers.

steps.title: Apply the structure to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A directly names this exact structure: a general trend followed by a specific example.

The other choices describe different organizational patterns—challenges to arguments, alternatives to questioned actions, or reinterpretations of rejected beliefs—that don't match the text.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
